svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron"> <diagram id="current-as-is" name="Current As-Is"> <mxGraphModel dx="-839" dy="-257" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1654" pageHeight="1169" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="client" parent="1" style="swimlane;startSize=30;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontStyle=1" value="客户端与运维入口" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="520" width="250" x="30" y="30" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="browser" parent="client" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf" value="浏览器
Public / 登录用户 / Admin" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="75" width="200" x="25" y="70" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="worker" parent="client" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656" value="Ubuntu 定时 Worker
回流、缩略图同步" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="75" width="200" x="25" y="190" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="git" parent="client" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#666666;dashed=1" value="GitHub Kicgut
master / release" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="75" width="200" x="25" y="330" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ecs" parent="1" style="swimlane;startSize=30;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffe6cc;strokeColor=#d79b00;fontStyle=1" value="ECS 生产主机" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="700" width="800" x="340" y="30" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="nginx" parent="ecs" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffe6cc;strokeColor=#d79b00" value="Nginx
HTTPS / fany.top / 反向代理" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="200" x="30" y="65" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="nuxt" parent="ecs" style="swimlane;startSize=30;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontStyle=1" value="Nuxt 3 + Nitro 单体" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="410" width="490" x="270" y="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ui" parent="nuxt" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf" value="Vue 页面
Public / AI / Admin / Security" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="75" width="190" x="25" y="65" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="api" parent="nuxt" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffe6cc;strokeColor=#d79b00" value="Nitro Server API
Auth / Article / Photo / Album
AI / Content / Skill / Storage" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="95" width="210" x="255" y="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="services" parent="nuxt" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#e1d5e7;strokeColor=#9673a6" value="领域服务与安全策略
JWT + HttpOnly Refresh Session
TOTP / 恢复码 / Token 撤销
权限、审计、配额、同步策略" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="120" width="270" x="110" y="215" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="db" parent="ecs" style="shape=cylinder3;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366" value="SQLite + Prisma
13 migrations
Users / AuthSession / Articles
Photos / AI conversations / Jobs / Audit" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="120" width="230" x="35" y="520" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="volumes" parent="ecs" style="shape=cylinder3;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366" value="ECS 持久化卷
data/blog-md / content-pipeline
uploads / thumbnails / backups" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="120" width="230" x="310" y="520" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="frp" parent="ecs" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffe6cc;strokeColor=#d79b00" value="FRP / Host Gateway
到 Ubuntu 内部服务" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="90" width="160" x="595" y="530" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ubuntu" parent="1" style="swimlane;startSize=30;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontStyle=1" value="Ubuntu 服务主机" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="520" width="410" x="1190" y="30" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="photoapi" parent="ubuntu" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366" value="Photo Original API
受控原图读取" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="75" width="165" x="25" y="70" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="skillsapi" parent="ubuntu" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366" value="Skills API
SKILL.md 只读来源" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="75" width="165" x="215" y="70" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="photos" parent="ubuntu" style="shape=cylinder3;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366" value="本地照片与缩略图
/mnt/data/personal-website" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="100" width="165" x="25" y="220" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="hermes" parent="ubuntu" style="shape=cylinder3;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366" value="Hermes Skills 目录
~/.hermes/skills" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="100" width="165" x="215" y="220" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ai" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#666666;dashed=1" value="外部 AI Provider
mock / OpenAI-compatible" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="75" width="240" x="690" y="790" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="drift" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;fontStyle=1" value="当前代码与设计仍有差距
AI 会话管理 UI / Jobs 运维 / Storage 一致性检查
E2E 与并发测试 / 发布保留自动化" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="100" width="300" x="330" y="790" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e1" edge="1" parent="1" source="browser" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=block" target="nginx" value="HTTPS"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e2" edge="1" parent="1" source="nginx" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=block" target="api" value="proxy"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e3" edge="1" parent="1" source="ui" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=block" target="api" value="UI 调用"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e4" edge="1" parent="1" source="api" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=block" target="services" value="领域授权与业务编排"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e5" edge="1" parent="1" source="services" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=block" target="db" value="Prisma"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e6" edge="1" parent="1" source="services" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=block" target="volumes" value="文件读写"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e7" edge="1" parent="1" source="frp" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=block" target="photoapi" value="FRP / 内部 HTTP"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e8" edge="1" parent="1" source="frp" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=block" target="skillsapi" value="FRP / 内部 HTTP"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e9" edge="1" parent="1" source="photoapi" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=block" target="photos" value="原图读取"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e10" edge="1" parent="1" source="skillsapi" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=block" target="hermes" value="Skill 同步"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e11" edge="1" parent="1" source="worker" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=block" target="api" value="Token 轮换 / 回流"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e12" edge="1" parent="1" source="services" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=block;dashed=1" target="ai" value="chat API"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e13" edge="1" parent="1" source="git" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=block;dashed=1" target="ecs" value="发布 / 部署"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
